title: Scaffolder stamps make-teammate; Preflight's global-skill gate drops to zero
description: make-teammate is generic and identical across projects, so per the framework's own invariant rule it belongs in the package: the Template ships it beside the stamped Lifecycle skills and init stamps it into every Instance's .claude/skills/. The Setup Skill's Preflight stops requiring any global skill (the make-teammate gate goes; the only remaining prerequisite is a working node/npx). Personal-level copies override the stamped one on collision — benign, same content family. Removes the last external dependency blocking plugin-marketplace publication. End-to-end: a fresh adopter with no personal skills installs the plugin, runs the Setup Skill, and Preflight passes; init stamps make-teammate; the Team step of the Setup Grill works.
acceptance_criteria: src/template ships make-teammate; init stamps it into .claude/skills/
Setup Skill Preflight requires no global skills
ADR-0003 amended: make-teammate joins the stamped skill set
package-qa PASS (manifest grows by the new template file; pack parity holds)
Dogfood root mirrors the stamped copy (Src-First)
Ships in the next npm release
root_cause: make-teammate predates the Scaffolder and stayed a personal global skill after the lifecycle skills were stamped (ADR-0003)
notes: Surfaced 2026-06-10 scoping plugin publication, immediately after EXEC-073 removed the async-questions gate.
